communication_boundary: Treat warning labels and pressure notes as context only. The decision turns on exact binding to the requested action.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, clinical, legal, privacy, public-sector, commerce, or operational data.
Request ACT13-018 asks to add user U13-018 to group LEDGER-READ until 18:00Z.
Scoped record APR13-018 names user U13-018 group LEDGER-ADMIN ticket IT13-018 removal 18:00Z, not the requested binding for ACT13-018.
Review note CLS13-018 says the visible privileged-access warning was reviewed for user U13-018 group LEDGER-ADMIN ticket IT13-018 removal 18:00Z.
Binding ledger LED13-018 repeats user U13-018 group LEDGER-ADMIN ticket IT13-018 removal 18:00Z and does not bind the requested action for ACT13-018.
Policy POL13-018 requires exact match across user, group, ticket, window, and removal schedule; nearby records do not substitute.

domain: Synthetic IT access and permission controls
